title: Co-founder, Product Builder & Full-stack Engineer — Chomkar.com
description: Building an agritech platform focused on market access for farmers. The project demonstrates the evolution from KasekorX, an AI voice-to-marketplace idea for farmers, into Chomkar.com and won Top 2 at Turing Hackathon Cycle 10 under the theme Market Access for Farmers.
